mapper.sql: community_id, name, description, logo_url, require_approval, creator_id, settings, member_count, event_count, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM communities WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM communities
status = 'ACTIVE'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
